channel.title: DevOps on Yida Weng
channel.description: Recent content in DevOps on Yida Weng

item.title: Deploying The Hive: Taking a Multi-Agent Engineering System to Production on GKE
item.description: A complete walkthrough of containerizing, provisioning cloud infrastructure on GCloud, and deploying a multi-agent AI engineering platform to GKE Autopilot using Terraform, Docker, and Cloud Build
